title: Your Certs Are Expiring: Digital Certificate Management Explained
summary: Jeff Crume explains digital certificates, their role in securing websites and APIs, and the risks posed by expiration. The video argues that certificate lifecycle management is becoming a critical cybersecurity discipline, especially as certificate lifetimes shorten.
